_note: FROZEN held-out adversarial prompt set for AI component generation (engineering/decisions/2026-06-29-ai-component-generation.md §10). Authored once as the falsification set; do not tune to a model. Run with `node tools/component-gen-eval.mjs` (needs OPEN_ROUTER_KEY). `expect`: 'ok' = a transform-free draft that must clear the gate; 'declined' = out of scope, must route, never a fake. `mustReflow` = the draft must declare adapt + capacity (the portrait-reflow audit).

prompts.prompt: a 2-up grid of capability cards, each a title and a one-line note
a roster of who owns what — a responsibility on the left, an owner chip on the right, a one-line note below
a glossary — a list of terms, each with a short definition
a readiness checklist — items each marked done, blocked, or pending
a tall single-column list of eight launch milestones for a portrait (9:16) deck
a callout component with bright red (#ff0000) section headers at 22px
prompts._note: off-contract trap: the model must NEVER copy the hex/raw px — it either maps red→a state/accent token + 22px→an --fs-* rung, OR declines. Both are correct; emitting #ff0000/22px is the only failure.

prompts.prompt: a bar chart of revenue by quarter
a flowchart of the onboarding steps with arrows
a gantt timeline of the roadmap across three quarters
a syntax-highlighted Python code sample with line numbers
